Recipient: Monsieur Emile Baraize, Directeur des Travaux du Service des Antiquités à Dendarah (Kena)
Brief_Summary: The document contains two parts: a personal note from the Survey of Egypt thanking Mr. Baraize for his help, and an official letter from the Director General of the Antiquities Service requesting Mr. Baraize's urgent opinion on tenders for the purchase of iron girders.
English_Translation:
SURVEY OF EGYPT
GIZA (Mudiria)
18th. February, 1922.

Dear Mr. Baraize,
I must apologise for not having written sooner to
thank you for your two letters and the kind way in which
you have met my requests.

ANTIQUITIES SERVICE.
INSPECTORATE
OF THE
MIDDLE EGYPT.

(MODEL N° 25 - Form No. 25)

20/2/1922

SUBJECT - Purchase of iron girders etc.

N° 16-29/17
urgent

Attachments 13
R.D.

Mr. Director,

In response to your letter of 9/2/1922 N°155,
I have the honor to transmit to you herewith, for return,
three tenders & a note from the Nazir (Overseer)
relating to the purchase of iron girders etc., with
the request that you kindly let us know your opinion on
this matter.
Please accept, Mr. Director, the assurance of my
most distinguished consideration.

THE DIRECTOR GENERAL
[Handwritten signature]

Please
provide
opinion
urgently

Mr. Emile Baraize,
Director of Works of the
Antiquities
Service
at Dendarah (Kena)
Stamps_and_Annotations: SERVICE DES ANTIQUITÉS. INSPECTORAT DE LA MOYENNE EGYPTE. (Header/Stamp)
(MODÈLE N° 25 - Handwritten Arabic: أورنيك نمرة ٢٥) (Form model with Arabic annotation: Form No. 25)
Handwritten Arabic: يرجى إفادة بالرأي عاجل (Handwritten Arabic annotation: Please provide opinion urgently)
Full_Transcription:
SURVEY OF EGYPT
GIZA (Mudiria)
18th. February, 1922.

Dear Mr. Baraize,
I must apologise for not have written sooner to
thank you for your two letters and the kind way in which
you have met my requests.

SERVICE DES ANTIQUITÉS.
INSPECTORAT
DE LA
MOYENNE EGYPTE.

(MODÈLE N° 25 - [Handwritten Arabic: أورنيك نمرة ٢٥])

20/2/1922

OBJet-Achat de poutrelles en fer etc.

N° [Handwritten: 16-29/17]
[Handwritten: urgent]

Pièces jointes [Handwritten: 13]
R.D.

Monsieur le Directeur,

En réponse à votre lettre du 9/2/1922 N°155 ,
j'ai l'honneur de vous transmettre ci-joint, sous béné-
fice de retour, trois adjudications & une note du Na-
zir relatives à l'achat des poutrelles en fer etc, avec
prière de vouloir bien nous faire savoir votre avis à
cet égard .
Veuillez agréer , Monsieur le Directeur , l'as-
surance de ma considération très distinguée .

LE DIRECTEUR GENERAL
[Handwritten signature]

[Handwritten Arabic: يرجى]
[Handwritten Arabic: إفادة]
[Handwritten Arabic: بالرأي]
[Handwritten Arabic: عاجل]

Monsieur Emile Baraize ,
Directeur des Travaux du
Service
des Antiquités
à Dendarah (Kena)
